name: CHIMERA INVESTMENT CORP
summary: Chimera Investment Corporation is an internally managed REIT incorporated in Maryland in 2007 that invests in, originates, and manages primarily residential real estate assets. Products include residential mortgage loans, Non-Agency RMBS, Agency RMBS, Agency CMBS, MSRs, business purpose loans, RTLs, HELOCs, and reverse mortgages. Through subsidiary HomeXpress, it originates consumer Non-QM, investor business purpose, and QM residential mortgage loans. It also provides third-party investment management and advisory services via subsidiary Palisades Advisory Services LLC.

products.name: Non-Agency RMBS
products.description: Residential mortgage-backed securities not guaranteed by any U.S. government agency.

products.name: Agency RMBS
products.description: Residential MBS issued or guaranteed by Fannie Mae, Freddie Mac, or Ginnie Mae.

products.name: Agency CMBS
products.description: Commercial MBS issued or guaranteed by a federally chartered agency.

products.name: Residential Mortgage Loans
products.description: Direct investments in residential mortgage loans including RPLs and Non-QM loans.

products.name: Business Purpose Loans / RTLs
products.description: Residential transition loans and investor loans for business purposes.

products.name: MSRs
products.description: Mortgage servicing rights acquired or managed as part of investment portfolio.

products.name: HELOCs and Junior Liens
products.description: Home equity lines of credit and junior lien real estate assets.

products.name: Consumer Non-QM Loans
products.description: Non-qualified mortgage loans originated through HomeXpress for non-traditional borrowers.

products.name: Third-Party Investment Management and Advisory Services
products.description: Non-discretionary and discretionary investment management services provided via Palisades Advisory Services LLC.
